description: An engineer activates privileged access through Azure AD PIM without proper justification, triggering an access review and potential security investigation.

metadata.title: PIM Emergency Access Escalation
metadata.summary: An engineer activates privileged access through Azure AD PIM without proper justification, triggering an access review and potential security investigation.
risks: Lack of justification for elevated access
learning_objectives: Identify improper use of emergency access
Apply least privilege and governance controls
Interpret PIM audit logs and access review findings
